description: Style NoteThis french connection piece nails all the season's bag trends perfectly - carry this to add a refined dimension to any simple outfit. A necessary indulgence, which is sure to become a love-forever classic in your collection, this bag hits all the fashion notes just right.Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment with an inner zipped pocketTwo short glossy handles for carrying at easeLegs at the base and branded sliders for easy useMaterial and CareBlendedDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight: 36 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth: 12 cm
